title: Skill
description: AIBrain/skills/<slug>/skill.yaml — see MASTER_PROMPT.md canonical Brain layout

id.description: Stable slug, matches the parent skills/<slug>/ directory name

triggers.description: Glob patterns or keyword phrases that should surface this skill

targets.description: Tool ids this skill is projected to, e.g. claude-code, cursor

source.description: Origin path or URL this skill was imported from, or the Brain path if authored natively

sha256.description: Checksum of SKILL.md, recomputed on every import to detect drift
